ack.detail: DICOM Listener auto-generates its DICOM response after the source transformer, not an HL7 ACK/NACK.
ack.evidence: Bedford, DICOM, c14efd23-2c1c-4e53-a59f-dcfe0e727c3b, canonical/Bedford/DICOM.xml: sourceConnector DICOM Listener lines 10-19

calls.payload_shape: Raw DICOM body (application/dicom); request parameters institution_id=1, identifier_type=LOCAL-1-0, file_name=originalFilename, content_type=application/dicom, system_message=local_AET, request_type=dicom_request, and source_platform derived from AET hints.
calls.evidence: Bedford, DICOM, c14efd23-2c1c-4e53-a59f-dcfe0e727c3b, canonical/Bedford/DICOM.xml: destination PayloadProcessor API Send lines 488-581; source transformer Set source platform tag based on AET lines 228-250

auth.credential_source: connector field: PayloadProcessor API Send username api and redacted password

session_persistence.relogin_trigger: na - credentials are configured on the HTTP sender per message
session_persistence.evidence: Bedford, DICOM, c14efd23-2c1c-4e53-a59f-dcfe0e727c3b, canonical/Bedford/DICOM.xml: PayloadProcessor API Send lines 571-576; deploy/undeploy scripts lines 634-639

evidence.claim: DICOM metadata is parsed from a DICOM response and the source transformer derives identifier_type and institution_id from configurationMap defaultPatientIdentifierType or a local_AET match; source_platform becomes imagenet or forum when either AET contains that string, otherwise generic.
evidence.location: Bedford, DICOM, c14efd23-2c1c-4e53-a59f-dcfe0e727c3b, canonical/Bedford/DICOM.xml: source transformer Extract identifier_type and institution_id from Local AET lines 203-226; Set source platform tag based on AET lines 228-250; getDicomHeaders response transformer lines 342-359

evidence.claim: The File Writer sends the raw DICOM to /mnt/dicom but is controlled by a response transformer that removes it unless manufacturer contains Zeiss, model contains IOLMaster, and SOP Class UID is one of two configured values.
evidence.location: Bedford, DICOM, c14efd23-2c1c-4e53-a59f-dcfe0e727c3b, canonical/Bedford/DICOM.xml: getDicomHeaders response transformer remove first destination if type is not compatible lines 361-376; File Writer lines 401-442

notes: No HL7v2 parsing or emission is configured. The configured PayloadProcessor institution_id and identifier_type are fixed connector parameters, even though the source transformer also calculates same-named channel-map values.

ack.detail: File polling channel; no HL7 listener or emitted HL7 payload is used.
ack.evidence: Bedford, Document OUT, 375fe7b2-d55c-4c60-b66f-dc2000c8ea95, canonical/Bedford/Document OUT.xml: File Reader source and SFTP File Writer

auth.credential_source: connector field: SFTP redacted username and password

session_persistence.relogin_trigger: na - SFTP password authentication is connector-configured
session_persistence.evidence: Bedford, Document OUT, 375fe7b2-d55c-4c60-b66f-dc2000c8ea95, canonical/Bedford/Document OUT.xml: destination SFTP lines 135-161; deploy/undeploy scripts lines 314-319

evidence.claim: The source is a raw binary File Reader on /mnt/docman which excludes names containing Internal and deletes successful input; the destination writes message.rawData as originalFilename through SFTP.
evidence.location: Bedford, Document OUT, 375fe7b2-d55c-4c60-b66f-dc2000c8ea95, canonical/Bedford/Document OUT.xml: sourceConnector File Reader lines 53-80; destination SFTP lines 135-161

notes: The destination transformer declares an unused HL7V2 outbound template, but the File Writer explicitly sends raw file content, so this channel does not parse or emit HL7v2 at runtime.

ack.detail: File polling source has responseVariable None.
ack.evidence: Bedford, Document Upload PP, f703f9cd-a6ee-42e6-8550-c6a9c3fb1c73, canonical/Bedford/Document Upload PP.xml: File Reader source lines 39-81

calls.payload_shape: Raw uploaded file body with MIME type inferred from the filename extension. Parameters parsed from eight __-separated filename parts: patient_identifier_type, patient_id, firm_id, document_subtype, laterality (B normalized to N), unique_ref, document_date and document_title; request_type=document_upload_request and system_message=Document Upload.

evidence.claim: Only pdf, image, video and audio extensions in the configured regular expression are polled, and the input must have exactly eight __-separated filename components or is filtered with an invalid-format error.

ack.detail: MLLP TCP Listener auto-generates the HL7 response before processing; configured success/error/reject ACK codes are AA/AE/AR.
ack.evidence: Bedford, PAS IN, d69815ee-68d1-4dcb-8896-8b12ba06a9c4, canonical/Bedford/PAS IN.xml: TCP Listener lines 10-38 and HL7 responseGenerationProperties lines 92-110

field_map.note: XSLT selects the NHS repetition.

field_map.target: Patient.HospitalNumber and V2 Patient path HospitalNumber
field_map.note: Primary Patient XSLT and HospitalNumber script use PID-2.1; IdentifierTypeCode is fixed LOCAL-1-1.
Title case-normalized; middle name appended to FirstName.
DOB reformatted yyyy-MM-dd; 1/M maps M, 2/F maps F, otherwise U.

field_map.target: Patient.AddressList.Address Line1, Line2, City, County, Postcode, Country
field_map.note: One HOME address per PID-11; NSP or absent country maps GB.
PH selects telephone, CP selects mobile, NET selects email.
NSP translated to Z for ethnicity; Y maps deceased=1; death date reformatted yyyy-MM-dd.
Non-NS next-of-kin is rendered with contact/address/phone/mobile/email fields.
PD1-3.8=OP produces Optometrist; practice and GP fields are conditional, GP code defaults when absent.

field_map.target: PatientAppointment path VisitID and AppointmentMapping VisitNumber
field_map.note: Used by the configured appointment PUT and DELETE connectors.
Timestamp split to yyyy-MM-dd and HH:mm.
Doctor defaults Unknown and AdmitSource defaults none.
Script generates Scheduled, Did Not Attend, transfer, departed, attended, arrived or discharged status text.
Secondary Patient XSLT uses MRG-1 and A40 merge payload pairs it with primary HospitalNumber.

calls.payload_shape: Patient XML built for A40 from MRG/PID/PD1/NK1; secondary HospitalNumber is MRG-1(MR), IdentifierTypeCode is LOCAL-1-0.
calls.evidence: Bedford, PAS IN, d69815ee-68d1-4dcb-8896-8b12ba06a9c4, canonical/Bedford/PAS IN.xml: destination PASAPI - Secondary Patient lines 163-213; PASAPI XSLT Step lines 216-341; A40 filter lines 683-695

calls.payload_shape: Patient XML containing identifiers, demographics, addresses, contacts, phone/email, ethnicity, death information, practice, GP, language, interpreter requirement and risks; primary HospitalNumber is PID-2.1 and IdentifierTypeCode LOCAL-1-1.
calls.evidence: Bedford, PAS IN, d69815ee-68d1-4dcb-8896-8b12ba06a9c4, canonical/Bedford/PAS IN.xml: destination PASAPI - Patient lines 703-753; PatientXML XSLT lines 756-886; HospitalNumber script lines 890-903; M05 exclusion filter lines 1228-1239

calls.payload_shape: PatientId from preceding patient response, IdentifierTypeCode LOCAL-1-0, appointment date/time and mappings Doctor, Clinic, AdmitSource, VisitNumber and Status; X-OE-Partial-Record header. Connector is disabled.
calls.evidence: Bedford, PAS IN, d69815ee-68d1-4dcb-8896-8b12ba06a9c4, canonical/Bedford/PAS IN.xml: destination Clinic List - PUT lines 1248-1333; Appointment Filter lines 1503-1533

calls.payload_shape: PatientMerge XML with PrimaryPatientNumber=HospitalNumber and SecondaryPatientNumber=SecondaryHospitalNumber; filtered to A40.
calls.evidence: Bedford, PAS IN, d69815ee-68d1-4dcb-8896-8b12ba06a9c4, canonical/Bedford/PAS IN.xml: destination PASAPI - Patient Merge lines 1778-1830; A40 filter lines 2003-2019

calls.payload_shape: No body; connector has an A38 filter but is disabled.

ack.detail: The HTTP Listener waits for JavaScript destination Respond (responseVariable d6), which returns transformed PAS response XML or <PatientList/>. The TCP Sender itself uses MLLP framing and receives the remote response.
ack.evidence: Bedford, PAS OUT, 06f0b8b8-5ea0-41a4-a0bc-04b89fb5193c, canonical/Bedford/PAS OUT.xml: HTTP Listener lines 10-49; Convert K21 to XML lines 564-583; Create response lines 691-801; Respond lines 988-1017

field_map.note: hosnum takes precedence.

field_map.source: HTTP Parameters.xmlrequest event_type and segment objects
field_map.target: outbound ADT MSH-9.2 and rendered HL7 segment fields
field_map.note: JSON converted from XML is rendered into HL7; MSH-9.1 fixed ADT.
AES/RDCEC location-status labels map to PAS codes; invalid mappings are cleared.
Replaced with newly created MSH-7.1 timestamp.
K21 response transformed to XML.

field_map.source: remote PID-2(PAS), PID-3(NHS), PID-5, PID-7, PID-8, PID-11, PID-13, PID-22, PID-29, PD1, PID-15, PID-35
field_map.note: XSLT builds identifiers, demographics, correspondence/home addresses, contact, ethnic group, death, practice/GP, language, interpreter and risks.

session_persistence.evidence: Bedford, PAS OUT, 06f0b8b8-5ea0-41a4-a0bc-04b89fb5193c, canonical/Bedford/PAS OUT.xml: HTTP Listener NoneHttpAuthProperties lines 10-15; TCP Sender configuration lines 265-314; deploy/undeploy scripts lines 1228-1238

evidence.claim: The listener receives HTTP XML, constructs either QBP^Q21 for an identifier query or ADT from xmlrequest, and sends the encoded HL7 through the enabled Send Q21 TCP Sender.
evidence.location: Bedford, PAS OUT, 06f0b8b8-5ea0-41a4-a0bc-04b89fb5193c, canonical/Bedford/PAS OUT.xml: source transformer Set hosnum parameter lines 64-72 and Set Message Type and data lines 74-195; Send Q21 connector lines 263-537

evidence.claim: The response XSLT uses the Send Q21 response converted to XML and the final Respond destination returns it to the HTTP caller, with <PatientList/> fallback when TransformedResponse is absent.
evidence.location: Bedford, PAS OUT, 06f0b8b8-5ea0-41a4-a0bc-04b89fb5193c, canonical/Bedford/PAS OUT.xml: Convert K21 to XML lines 539-690; Create response XSLT lines 691-801; Respond lines 988-1017

notes: No OpenEyes HTTP API call is configured. PAS OUT is an HTTP-to-MLLP PAS query/ADT bridge; its HTTP listener explicitly has no authentication.
